title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited Advisory Limited:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited Advisory Limited!
